title: 3 a.m.
why_this_song: 3 a.m. by Matchbox Twenty (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: And she only sleeps when it's raining
And she screams and her voice is straining
It's 3 a.m., I must be lonely

And she screams, and her voice is straining

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "well" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "well" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: She's always worried about things like that
Well, yeah, when she says, baby, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And she only sleeps when it's raining

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "3 a.m." in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "3 a.m." em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "3 a.m." to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "3 a.m.", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "3 a.m." with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "3 a.m." com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "3 a.m." as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "3 a.m." como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?
